what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment in the design-assets channel, linking attachment id att-4d6f294c to the image asset target image://design-assets/icons/Gyro_Gold with an added timestamp.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text
The target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/Gyro_Gold
standouts: Target URI uses an image:// scheme
It belongs to the design-assets channel
conventions: Id prefix att- follows an attachment naming convention
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with explicit timezone
Target is referenced by a structured URI rather than a filesystem path
concerns: The image:// target URI cannot be resolved from the file alone
There is no title, description, author, or checksum for the attachment
The added timestamp is in the future relative to the current date
notes: A bare attachment record that points the design-assets channel to a Gyro_Gold image asset via an image:// URI.
questions: What is the Gyro_Gold image and what does it represent?
Is image:// an internal scheme or an external reference?
What image format, dimensions, or size does the target have?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the future added timestamp intentional or a data-entry error?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be an attachment ledger entry and it does record an image attachment for the design-assets channel, so its apparent purpose matches its content.
intention_signals: It seems intended to register the Gyro_Gold icon as an image attachment under the design-assets channel so it can be referenced and tracked alongside other channel assets.
novelty: The use of an image:// URI scheme for the attachment target is the most distinctive feature; otherwise the record is a conventional metadata stub.
contribution: It contributes a dated, typed link between a channel attachment identifier and a specific image asset target in the design-assets channel, which a fused system could use to locate or associate the Gyro_Gold icon.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel attachment metadata record (att-4d6f294c) in the design-assets channel that references the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Gyro_Gold and was added on 2026-06-22T12:26:22.996675+00:00.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog an image attachment so the Gyro_Gold icon asset can be tracked within the design-assets channel.
